name: Cog
description: Brass gears with dashed teeth meshing in the dark — every redraw turns the whole movement by a few degrees.

code.style: --mesh: @rand(180deg); --rule: ( /* teeth ring and hub share one emitted brass tone */ --gear: @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4)); @random(${shapeFrequency}) { :before { content: ''; position: absolute; inset: 12%; border-radius: 50%; border: calc(@rand(30, 52) * 1px / @Y) dashed @var(--gear); transform: rotate(var(--mesh)); transition: ease 900ms; } :after { content: ''; position: absolute; inset: 38%; border-radius: 50%; border: calc(22px / @Y) solid @var(--gear); opacity: 0.7; transition: ease 900ms; } } );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
